# On Anger

*[Seneca](../philosophers/seneca.md) · 45*

A treatise in three books in which Seneca analyzes anger as the most dangerous of the passions and offers concrete means to prevent and extinguish it. It is a finished example of the Stoic therapy of the emotions, understood as mistaken judgments.
